robots.name: Drug Discovery Pipeline
robots.description: DNA → protein structure → drug screening. Lipinski scoring, binding compatibility.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Protein Folder
robots.description: 2D lattice HP model folding. Drag residues to minimize energy. Simulated annealing auto-fold. Known optimal energies.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Cell Counter
robots.description: Detect and classify blood cells in microscope view. RBC, WBC, platelets. Pie chart distribution. Manual vs AI count.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Gene Expression
robots.description: Animate DNA→mRNA→Protein. Click bases to mutate — see silent, missense, and nonsense mutations. Codon table included.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Molecular Dynamics
robots.description: Atoms interacting via Lennard-Jones potential. Adjust temperature for phase transitions: solid → liquid → gas. Click to add energy.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Evolution Simulator
robots.description: Natural selection in action. Creatures eat, reproduce with mutations, evolve traits. Add predators for selection pressure.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Protein Predictor
robots.description: Paste an amino acid sequence, get secondary structure prediction. ESM-2 model (Meta) running in browser via WebGPU.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Molecule Analyzer
robots.description: Enter SMILES notation, see 2D structure + molecular weight + LogP + drug-likeness (Lipinski Rule of 5). 10 preset molecules.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: DNA Replication
robots.description: Animated replication fork. Helicase, primase, polymerase, Okazaki fragments.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Neuron Simulator
robots.description: Hodgkin-Huxley model. Inject current, see action potentials. Na+/K+ gating.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Genetic Pedigree
robots.description: Draw family trees, assign genotypes. Punnett squares. Dominant/recessive/X-linked.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: PCR Simulator
robots.description: Denature/anneal/extend thermal cycling. Watch DNA double each cycle. Exponential chart.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Enzyme Kinetics
robots.description: Michaelis-Menten + Lineweaver-Burk. Three inhibitor modes. Vmax/Km sliders.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Hardy-Weinberg
robots.description: Allele frequencies, selection, drift, migration. Check equilibrium conditions.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Cell Division
robots.description: Mitosis & meiosis visualizer. Step through prophase, metaphase, anaphase, telophase. Crossing over in meiosis. Chromosome count tracking.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Ecosystem Dynamics
robots.description: Lotka-Volterra predator-prey simulation. Animated populations, real-time graphs, food chains, carrying capacity, cascade events.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: CRISPR Gene Editing
robots.description: Design guide RNA, watch Cas9 bind and cut DNA. Choose NHEJ or HDR repair. Animated double helix, off-target analysis, protein product comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Biological Neural Network
robots.description: Hodgkin-Huxley neurons with excitatory/inhibitory synapses. Stimulate and watch action potentials propagate. Voltage traces, adjustable parameters.
robots.creator: serge-ivo
